rawAssistant: The spire looms ahead, a test of your team's mettle. Balancing strength with discipline is key – don't let impulsive decisions cloud your judgement. Rest and positioning are crucial; ensure Thornbeast is fed, hydrated, and positioned to take advantage of any narrow ledges or chokepoints. The mist may lift, revealing new hazards or opportunities – stay alert.
